Act, 20P9 (1 of 2010), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules to amend the Leg.al Metrology (Numeration) Rules, 2011, namely :_ 1. (1) These rules may be called as the Legal Metrology (Numeration) Amendment Rules. 2011. (2) These shall come in to force on the lSI day of April, 2011. 2. In the Legal Metrology (Numeration) Rules. 2011, in rule 1. of sub-rule (2). for the words, figures and letters "on the l&t day of March, 2011" the words, figures and letters " on the 1st day of April. 2011" shall be substituted. [F. No. WM 9(6)/2010.Pt.] RAKESH KACKER, Spl. Secy.
